description: Example of LLM color generation output with seed colors marked

example.reasoning: Ocean blue and sunset coral are the brand's core identity colors, establishing trust and energy. These seed colors drive the entire palette, with supporting neutrals and semantic colors derived to maintain consistency.

uiVisualization: ColorPreview: ocean-blue and sunset-coral show 'SEED' badge
ColorView canvas: ocean-blue and sunset-coral rectangles have circular seed indicator
ColorView hover: ocean-blue and sunset-coral info cards show 'SEED' badge
graphMetadata: All base.color.ocean-blue-* nodes have metadata.isSeed = true
All base.color.sunset-coral-* nodes have metadata.isSeed = true
Other color nodes have metadata.isSeed = false or undefined
scaleGeneration: Each seed color generates a full 50-900 scale (10 shades)
Each shade inherits the isSeed metadata from its parent color
Seed indicator appears on all shades (e.g., ocean-blue-100, ocean-blue-500, etc.)
